task_completion.description: Verify the survey is created with the correct English and Spanish titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Cross-Cultural Social Trust Study 2024' and its Spanish translation 'Estudio Transcultural de Confianza Social 2024' in the LimeSurvey overview, survey settings, or language settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the two required question groups are created with bilingual titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the survey structure panel for the groups 'Interpersonal Trust' ('Confianza Interpersonal') and 'Institutional Confidence' ('Confianza Institucional').

task_completion.description: Verify Q1, Q2, and Q3 are created as 'List (Radio)' questions with correct English and Spanish text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the survey structure or question editor for Q1, Q2, and Q3. Verify their type is 'List (Radio)' and they contain the specified English and Spanish text (e.g., 'Generally speaking, would you say that most people can be trusted?' / 'En general, ¿diría usted que se puede confiar en la mayoría de las personas?').

task_completion.description: Verify Q4 is created as an 'Array' question with correct text and bilingual sub-questions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Q4 in the survey structure. Verify its type is 'Array', the main question text matches the prompt in both languages, and the sub-questions (Police/Policía, Courts/Tribunales, Government/Gobierno, Press/Prensa) are present.

task_completion.description: Verify Q5 is created as a 'List (Radio)' question with correct English and Spanish text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Q5 in the survey structure. Verify its type is 'List (Radio)' and it contains the text 'How satisfied are you with the way democracy works in your country?' / '¿Qué tan satisfecho está usted con la forma en que funciona la democracia en su país?'.

task_completion.description: Verify the survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Active' status indicator, a green checkmark next to the survey status, or a 'Stop this survey' button on the survey overview page, indicating it is currently active.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web interface to create the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LimeSurvey admin dashboard and form editors, not terminal commands, API scripts, or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually inputted the translations into the LimeSurvey application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Spanish text should be visible inside the LimeSurvey text fields, language tabs, or structure tree, rather than just printed in a terminal or written in a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the browser is accessing a genuine LimeSurvey instance.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show a valid local or server URL for LimeSurvey (e.g., localhost, 127.0.0.1, or a specific test server IP), not a file:// URL pointing to a mock HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected English title is 'Cross-Cultural Social Trust Study 2024' and the Spanish title is 'Estudio Transcultural de Confianza Social 2024'. The expected Spanish group names are 'Confianza Interpersonal' and 'Confianza Institucional'. The required language code for Spanish is 'es'.
